validation_method: Streaming zipformer transducer ONNX trio (encoder/decoder/joiner int8 chunk-16-left-128) consumed natively by OnlineRecognizer transducer model field on the bundled onnxruntime. modelType=zipformer2. No format conversion was performed.
notes: Native ONNX artifacts, no conversion. Same JNI runtime as the RU model (libsherpa-onnx-jni.so + libonnxruntime.so, arm64-v8a).
